calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-30-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, Reporter: Miles Lendway, CSR #13684.

Jonathan Seigel, Esq., appearing on behalf of Plaintiff Warfield Hotel Inc.
Witness Sanjay Patel sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Jessica Saucedo Kennedy.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 118 Taylor Street, Apartment 317, San Francisco, California, 94102, County of San Francisco.

Damages $8,610.00
Holdover damages $4,657.09
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $0
For a Total Judgment of $13,267.09
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-30-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-25-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Grey, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Warfield Hotel Inc. is present. Represented by Sanjay Patel.
Attorney Jonathan Seigel for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jessica S. Kennedy is present.
Attorney Richard Roisman appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of May 30, 2017 remains on calendar. (501)
